backend/main.mo: Main actor for the service desk app, defining data types (Client, Job, Part, LaborRate) and CRUD endpoints for clients, jobs, parts, labor rates, and user profiles, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades the jobStore from OldJob (without laborLineItems) to NewJob (with laborLineItems defaulting to an empty array).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (labor line items on job detail, parts used on job detail, signature capture) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC Service Desk' and mounting the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with all app routes including dashboard, clients, jobs, invoice, calendar, inventory, settings, login, and profile setup.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header, main content outlet, and a fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Dashboard, Clients, Jobs, Inventory, Settings), handling auth redirects via useEffect.
frontend/src/components/SignatureCapture: A React component that renders a canvas-based signature pad allowing users to draw, save, or skip their signature, using the useSignaturePad hook and a mutation to store the result.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and expose identity state to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for backend interactions including user profiles, signatures, roles, clients, jobs, labor rates, and parts.
frontend/src/hooks/useSignaturePad.ts: A hook that attaches mouse and touch drawing event listeners to a canvas ref, tracks empty state, and exposes clear and PNG-byte-export utilities for a signature pad.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Displays a weekly calendar view of jobs, allowing navigation between weeks and showing job cards with client name, status, and Google Maps link for each scheduled job.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDetailPage.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a single client record, supporting fields like name, phone, address, email, and Google Review URL, with delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Lists all clients with search filtering by name, phone, or address, and provides navigation to add a new client or view/edit an existing one.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Shows an overview dashboard with job/client metric cards, recent jobs list, and labor rates, with owner-only sections gated by role check.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Manages parts inventory with search, inline editing, add/delete functionality, and low-stock warnings, restricted to owner users.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePreviewPage.ts: Renders a printable/downloadable invoice preview for a job, fetching job, client, and labor rate data, and generating a standalone HTML invoice document for download or sharing.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Provides a create/edit form for jobs with sections for labor line items, parts usage, and photo attachments, supporting full CRUD operations and status management.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Displays a filterable list of jobs grouped by status (Open, In Progress, Complete) as cards, with navigation to job details and a button to create new jobs.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the Internet Identity login screen with branding, handling authentication state and redirecting to home upon successful login.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Two-step onboarding page that collects the user's name and optionally captures a signature, saving the profile before navigating to the home screen.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Admin-only settings page for managing labor rates (create, edit, delete) and assigning user roles, with access restricted to administrators.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with OKLCH color tokens, Inter/Rajdhani fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and accordion/fade-in animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the ICP-based mobile service desk app architecture, existing features, role-based access control design, known issues, and incremental build history for Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC.
